items.title: [Google Play 差评] ★1 It pains me to write this review after a
items.summary: It pains me to write this review after almost a year of playing, but the changes coming in the next update have killed any positive opinions I had of this game. Many rewards that used to be permanent are getting turned into temporary rewards, including in paid packages, and the axioms bring genuine game-changing buffs to many characters that are only accessible to whales, when many of said characters need buffs to their base kits. These are changes I simply cannot get behind as a medium spender
items.author: JenriqueGamer
